insight: Protoplasm's pseudo-absorb-3 effect is considered situationally useful rather than consistently impactful, but it can synergize meaningfully with units like Zemora Voidbringer and Antima Comet when their timing is synchronized.
author: darkeisbein
context: darkeisbein noted Protoplasm feels rarely useful in most sets but had a fun game syncing it with Zemora Voidbringer and Antima Comet.
